scripts.build:electron: cd electron && bun build main.ts preload.ts --outdir=../dist-electron --format=cjs --target=node --external=electron && printf '{"type":"commonjs"}\n' > ../dist-electron/package.json
scripts.dev:electron: bun run build:electron && bun -e "import { spawn } from 'node:child_process'; import { createServer } from 'vite'; process.env.CUEPAD_ELECTRON = '1'; const server = await createServer({ server: { host: '127.0.0.1', port: 0 } }); await server.listen(); server.printUrls(); let exitCode = 1; try { const address = server.httpServer?.address(); if (!address || typeof address === 'string') throw new Error('无法读取 Vite 监听地址'); const electron = spawn('electron', ['.'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, ELECTRON_START_URL: 'http://127.0.0.1:' + address.port } }); exitCode = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { electron.once('error', reject); electron.once('exit', (code) => resolve(code ?? 1)); }); } finally { await server.close(); } process.exit(exitCode);"
scripts.test:electron: bun run build:electron && CUEPAD_ELECTRON_PORT=$(node -e "const server = require('node:net').createServer(); server.listen(0, '127.0.0.1', () => { console.log(server.address().port); server.close(); });") CUEPAD_TEST=1 bunx playwright test --config=playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.package:app: bun run build && bun run build:electron && bun run build:sidecar && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
